name: Proxy Horse
desc: If this card you control would be used as Link Material for a Cyberse monster, you can also use 1 Cyberse monster in your hand as material. During your End Phase: You can banish this card from your GY, then target 2 Link Monsters in your GY including a Cyberse Link Monster; return them to the Extra Deck. You can only use each effect of "Proxy Horse" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If this card you control would be used as Link Material for a Cyberse monster, you can also use 1 Cyberse monster in your hand as material. During your End Phase: You can banish this card from your GY, then target 2 Link Monsters in your GY including a Cyberse Link Monster; return them to the Extra Deck. You can only use each effect of "Proxy Horse" once per turn.

sets.set: Ghosts From the Past: The 2nd Haunting

action: Uses cards in the hand as Link Materials
Returns from your Graveyard to your Extra Deck
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
